faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about Game Dev Tycoon. Find quick solutions to your game problems.

manual.title: Game Dev Tycoon Manual
manual.subtitle: The complete manual for Game Dev Tycoon. Learn all game mechanics, strategies, and tips.

appGuide.title: How to Use This App
appGuide.subtitle: A quick introduction to all features of the Game Dev Tycoon Advisor. Find what you need quickly and optimize your gameplay.
appGuide.workflowsDesc: The most common tasks explained step by step
appGuide.featuresDesc: Click on a menu item in the sidebar to access each feature
appGuide.proTip1: Use the app alongside the game - keep it open on a second monitor or device.
appGuide.proTip2: Slider presets are the most important part - wrong sliders ruin even the best combinations.
appGuide.proTip3: Save your checklist regularly - it helps you keep track of progress.
appGuide.proTip4: For questions: Check the FAQ first, then the manual for detailed explanations.

planGameSteps: Go to 'Genre Recommender' and select your desired topic
Note the best genre for your topic
Switch to 'Platform Recommender' and select genre + audience
Open 'Slider Presets' and copy the values for your genre
Use the 'Game Planner' to combine everything
findSlidersSteps: Select your genre from the list
Read the values for all three phases
trackProgressSteps: Check off what you've already achieved
Add your own goals if desired

featureDesc.dashboard: Your home page with a quick overview of the best topic-genre combinations and important statistics.
featureDesc.topicRecommender: Select a genre and get the best matching topics for it.
featureDesc.genreRecommender: Select a topic and find the perfect genre for it.
featureDesc.platformRecommender: Find the best platform for your genre and target audience.
featureDesc.sliderPresets: The optimal slider settings for each genre across all three development phases.
featureDesc.planner: Plan your next game with all details and save it for later.
featureDesc.research: All technologies with unlock year, costs, and prerequisites.
featureDesc.staff: Tips for hiring and managing your team at each game phase.
featureDesc.timeline: Year-by-year walkthrough with important milestones and platform releases.
featureDesc.checklist: Interactive progress tracking for your playthrough.
featureDesc.faq: Answers to the most common questions about Game Dev Tycoon.
featureDesc.manual: The complete reference for all game mechanics.

dashboard: Shows the top 5 best combinations at a glance
Quick access to all important features
topicRecommender: First select a genre from the list
genreRecommender: Ideal when you have a specific theme in mind
Pay attention to the fit rating for best results
platformRecommender: Select genre AND audience for best results
Consider license costs and market share
Time filter helps with historical platforms
sliderPresets: Select your genre from the list
Copy the values for each phase
High values = more focus on that area
planner: Combine all recommendations in one plan
staff: Different tips for each office phase
timeline: Strategic tips for each time period
faq: Click a question to see the answer
